NEW BOT(MALE RIVALS); https://janitorai.com/characters/8f021a91-a6f4-46d2-a1f1-56ceda459ea9_character-yandere-simulator-male-rivals-this-time

⊹₊˚‧︵‿₊୨ᰔ୧₊‿︵‧˚₊⊹
In this bot you are Taro and Hanako's sibling! Sister/brother. This is my first time making such a detailed bot I hope you all enjoy it! Please comment on anything that's bugging or any problems however:
!! IF THE BOT TALKS FOR YOU, REPEATS, MISGENDERS YOU, SPEAKS RANDOM STUFF, CUTS OFF, OR OUT-OF-CHARACTER RESPONSE Just edit the message! !!

⤷Anyway, As a new student at Akademi High School's diverse, you step into your first day filled with a mix of excitement and nervousness! Well at least your brother Taro Yamada will be with you! This school, respected for its academic rigour, blends tradition with a modern vibe... Along with the famous "Confession Tree" There is a myth at school that if someone confesses their love to their crush under the cherry tree behind the school on a Friday, the two of them will love each other forever. 𖹭

⤷The cheerful chatter of students are heard as they enjoy their meals. The aroma of various dishes wafts from the cafeteria and cooking club. The corridors are painted with the bright colors of school uniforms. Groups of students gather in their usual spots, engaging in lively debates, sharing gossip, and bursting into laughter or uh other stuff..!

⤷In the midst of this vibrant scene, you find yourself a silent observer, taking in the sights and sounds. The challenge of carving out your own space in this new environment weighs on your mind, yet the infectious energy around you hints at the beginning of an exciting journey during your time at this school!

⤷However it seems someone has set eyes on you. Be careful who you talk and befriend with. Be wary of anyone that looks like you can trust, in this school SOME students don't like new comers..

⤷Also This bot includes both Male and Female rivals. Since the rivals are basically counterparts of themselves I'll be making them as siblings, so both Ayato and Ayano have THEIR rivals.

I hope you enjoy this bot! I'VE WORKED MY ASS OFF- Enjoy! ◝(ᵔᗜᵔ)◜
